name: MikroTik LtAP LTE7 kit
title: MikroTik LtAP LTE7 kit

detailed_description.heading: Reliable LTE Connectivity
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik LtAP LTE7 kit is a compact yet highly durable LTE access point engineered for mobile, outdoor, and remote networking scenarios where reliability is critical. Its rugged, weatherproof enclosure with IP54 protection allows the device to operate confidently in environments exposed to dust, moisture, vibration, and temperature extremes. This makes it an excellent choice for vehicle installations, industrial facilities, construction sites, remote monitoring locations, and temporary network deployments. A defining feature of the LtAP platform is its ability to operate reliably without constant supervision. The device is designed for continuous operation and long service life, making it suitable for mission-critical applications where downtime is unacceptable. Integrated GPS functionality adds another layer of versatility, enabling location tracking and fleet management use cases alongside standard networking tasks. Despite its robust construction, the LtAP LTE7 maintains a compact form factor that simplifies installation in confined spaces. It can be mounted directly on vehicles, poles, or outdoor structures without bulky external housings. This combination of durability, compactness, and functionality allows the LtAP LTE7 to bridge the gap between industrial hardware and professional networking equipment, delivering dependable connectivity wherever traditional routers cannot be deployed.

detailed_description.heading: Optimized Cellular Performance
detailed_description.text: The LtAP LTE7 kit is equipped with a modern LTE Category 7 modem, delivering a significant performance upgrade over earlier LTE solutions. This enables higher data throughput, improved responsiveness, and more stable connections for applications such as remote access, telemetry, video transmission, and secure VPN tunnels. The device is well suited for environments where network conditions change frequently, such as mobile or roaming deployments. Expanded frequency band support, including Band 32, enhances performance in congested cellular networks and improves roaming behavior across different regions and mobile operators. This allows the LtAP LTE7 to maintain reliable connectivity even in challenging radio conditions, such as dense urban areas or cross-border installations. MIMO technology further improves signal quality and data rates by optimizing transmission and reception paths. In addition to cellular connectivity, the device features integrated 2.4 GHz wireless networking, enabling it to act as a local access point for nearby devices. This allows laptops, sensors, or control equipment to connect directly without additional hardware. By combining LTE backhaul and Wi-Fi access in a single unit, the LtAP LTE7 simplifies network architecture while delivering consistent performance across both wired and wireless connections.

detailed_description.heading: Flexible Power and Expansion Options
detailed_description.text: Running MikroTik RouterOS v7, the LtAP LTE7 kit offers a full set of advanced networking features typically found in enterprise-grade routers. Users gain fine-grained control over routing, firewall rules, traffic management, VPN connections, and network monitoring. This makes the device suitable not only for simple connectivity tasks but also for complex network topologies in professional and industrial environments. The hardware platform supports multiple expansion options, including miniPCI-e slots for additional wireless or cellular interfaces and multiple SIM slots for redundancy and operator failover. This flexibility ensures continuous connectivity even if one mobile network becomes unavailable. Integrated monitoring features such as voltage and temperature sensors help maintain stable operation in demanding conditions. Power flexibility is another key advantage. The LtAP LTE7 supports multiple power input methods, including standard DC input, passive PoE, and automotive power, making it easy to integrate into vehicles or autonomous systems. The device is supplied with a complete accessory set, including a 24 V 1.2 A power adapter, a K-67 fastening set for secure mounting, and a 0.35 m 4-pin automotive adapter cable. This allows immediate deployment without additional components, reducing installation time and complexity.
